definition: on or into a ship, aircraft, or train
All passengers are now aboard the flight.
in or to a foreign country
She decided to study abroad for a year.
completely; totally
I absolutely agree with you.
by chance, unintentionally
I accidentally spilled coffee on my shirt.
in an active way
She actively participates in class discussions.
actually
I actually forgot my keys.
in addition; also
Additionally, we need to consider the environmental impact.
in spite of everything; despite what has been said or expected
He decided to go to the party after all.
at a later or subsequent time
We went to the cinema and afterward we had dinner.
at a later time; subsequently
We went to the cinema and afterwards we had dinner.
in alphabetical order
Please arrange the names alphabetically.
completely; in total
It was an altogether different experience than I expected.
in an angry manner
He shouted angrily at the driver.
in a way that causes annoyance
The alarm clock kept ringing annoyingly every five minutes.
once every year; yearly
The company publishes its financial report annually.
in any case; anyway
It started to rain, but we went out anyhow.
anymore
I don't live there anymore.
in any case; regardless
It was raining, but we went out anyway.
for each one; to or for each person or thing
The apples cost fifty cents apiece.
onto or to the shore
The boat drifted ashore during the storm.
without human intervention; by itself
The door opens automatically when you approach it.
for a short time
Please wait awhile, I'll be right back.
in or to the area behind the stage in a theater
The actors waited backstage before the show.
almost not, hardly
She could barely hear him over the noise.
in the most essential respects; fundamentally
Basically, the plan is to save money.
in advance; in anticipation
Please prepare all the documents beforehand.
without seeing or without thought/reason
He walked blindly into the dark room.
for a short time
He spoke briefly about his plans.
In a busy manner; actively.
The bees were busily collecting nectar from the flowers.
in a quiet and peaceful manner
She calmly explained the situation to the police.
in a way that shows a lack of care or attention
He carelessly left his keys on the table.
in a relaxed or informal way
He casually walked into the room as if nothing had happened.
in a careful and hesitant way
He opened the door cautiously.
In a clever way
She cleverly solved the puzzle.
in the direction of the movement of the hands of a clock
Turn the knob clockwise to open it.
in a close manner; with little space or time between
They worked closely together on the project.
in an awkward or careless way
He clumsily dropped the stack of plates.
totally
I completely forgot about the meeting.
all the time; continuously
He is constantly checking his phone.
In a way that involves cooperation
The team worked cooperatively to finish the project on time.
in the opposite direction to the movement of the hands of a clock

in a way that involves the use of imagination or original ideas
She approached the problem creatively.
currently

with deep affection; at great cost
She loved her grandmother dearly.
deeply

without any doubt
I will definitely be there.
in a careful or gentle way
He delicately placed the fragile vase on the shelf.
at an angle; in a diagonal direction
She walked diagonally across the park.
in a direct manner; without delay or interruption

towards the bottom of a slope
The path goes downhill from here.
towards a lower place or level

with great interest
She eagerly awaited the results.
towards the east
The ship sailed eastward.
towards the east
They traveled eastwards along the coast.
in an efficient manner

in, at, or to some other place

causing embarrassment; awkward

in an energetic manner; with energy

especially

surprisingly

in the end, especially after a long delay

extremely

to a moderate extent; justly

for all time; for always

towards the front

in an open, honest, and direct manner

without restriction or impediment
You can speak freely about your concerns.
recently, newly

completely, entirely

in a way that shows great anger; with great energy or speed

more, additionally

generally

in a gentle manner

with pleasure; willingly

slowly, little by little

with gratitude

to a great extent
Her efforts contributed greatly to the project's success.
at the midpoint between two points

almost not; barely

in a way that promotes good health
She eats healthily and exercises regularly.
to a great degree; with great weight

towards home

in an honest way

with hope

in a horizontal direction or position

in a terrible way

every hour

in whatever way; nevertheless

at once; instantly

in an important manner

growing, becoming more

in an innocent manner

immediately

as an alternative

in an interesting way
Interestingly, the experiment yielded unexpected results.
finally; in the last place

with little weight or force

probably

in the same way; also

in or to a particular area or neighborhood

not tightly or firmly

mostly; chiefly

by hand; not automatically

at the same time

in the mind

in the middle of the way or distance

incorrectly; by error (as in 'mistakenly')

for the most part; mainly

in a natural way; as expected

almost

in a negative way; unfavorably

every night

usually; in normal circumstances

towards the north

not anywhere

happening or appearing sometimes but not often

not connected to a computer network

on a ship, aircraft, or other vehicle

on or onto the stage

in a continuing forward direction

without concealment; frankly

in circumstances different from those present or implied

during the night

in or to a foreign country, across the sea

again and again

in a safe manner; without danger

apart from others

in a serious manner; very much

to or from the side

sincere

in a smart or intelligent way; in a stylish way

traveling or leading towards the south

with great physical power or force; in a strong manner

successfully

certainly; without doubt

in an unexpected way

at high speed; quickly

fortunately

for that reason; consequently

with a large distance between opposite sides or surfaces; densely

completely; absolutely.

usually; in a typical way

directly below

in a way that is not fair or just

sadly; regrettably

towards a higher place

further upstream

towards a higher place or level

towards the west
